name: New Life
description_short: This is not a financial services company. 'New Life' is an adult visual novel game developed by MiaToon, not a payday alternative lender or consumer finance provider.
description_long: New Life is an independent adult visual novel game created by developer MiaToon and hosted on itch.io, a platform for indie games. The game is not a financial services provider of any kind. It is a narrative-driven game where players control a character named Luna and make choices that determine her story path—either a 'good girl path' or a 'corrupted path.' The game is set in a rural countryside setting and focuses on Luna's personal development and relationships as she adjusts to life away from the city. New Life is distributed as free downloads for Windows, macOS, and Linux, with early-access chapters and exclusive content available to Patreon supporters. The game uses AI-assisted graphics generation (DomoAI and manual retouching) and is built using Ren'Py, a visual novel engine. This product has no connection whatsoever to consumer finance, lending, credit products, or payday alternatives. The categorization of 'New Life' as a payday-alternative on CreditDoc appears to be a data entry error or miscategorization. No financial services, lending products, credit options, or cash advances are offered. The game is purely entertainment media with adult themes. Anyone researching actual payday alternatives or emergency lending options should not consider this listing relevant to their financial needs.
